site.title: Leandro Stanger - Portfolio
site.description: Professional portfolio of Leandro Stanger - Developer and Computer Engineering Student

cards.title: Academic Background
cards.text: Computer Engineering student at UNOPAR - Universidade Norte do Paraná. Constantly evolving in the technology field, always seeking new knowledge and challenges for professional growth.

cards.title: Passion for Technology
cards.text: Passionate about programming, technology, and continuous learning. I believe technology has the power to transform the world and I strive to contribute to this transformation through the development of innovative solutions.

cards.title: Jiu-jitsu & Discipline
cards.text: Jiu-jitsu practitioner, a sport that teaches me discipline, resilience, and strategy – qualities I directly apply to software development and solving complex problems.

objetivo.title: Professional Objective
objetivo.text: I am seeking a position in the IT field as a Java Developer, JavaScript Developer, C Developer, or Database Analyst, where I can apply my knowledge in computer maintenance and networking. I have been dedicated to studying Java, JavaScript, and C (with a focus on embedded systems, programming logic, and performance), as well as the Spring ecosystem, Hibernate, Maven, and front-end frameworks. I aim to become a qualified full-stack developer. I continuously develop skills in technical support, systems administration, software development, and database management.

areas.title: Developer
areas.text: Interest in working on web application and system development using modern technologies and following best programming practices.

areas.title: Database
areas.text: I want to work with database modeling, administration, and optimization to ensure system integrity and performance.

areas.title: Java / Mobile
areas.text: Interest in mobile application development (Android) and backend with Java, exploring the Spring ecosystem, OOP best practices, and database integration.

areas.title: C Language
areas.text: Passion for low-level programming, embedded systems, drivers, and efficient algorithms. The C language gives me a deep understanding of memory, pointers, and performance, which is essential for my Computer Engineering education.

doacoes.title: Donations
doacoes.subtitle: Contribute to development
doacoes.intro:
Voluntary contributions directly help continue my studies and the development of this project.
I am currently on an academic journey at Unopar University, seeking to constantly evolve in the technology and development field.
The support received contributes to acquiring books, educational resources, and helps with college costs.
It also allows investing in improving the project and creating new technological initiatives in the future.
Any contribution is very welcome and makes a difference in this journey of learning and evolution.
